rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §49.254 governs voter approval of propositions in participating school districts under Chapter 41 wealth-equalization provisions. It does not address or depend on the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: The proposition is approved only if the proposition receives a favorable vote of the majority of the votes cast within each participating school district.
_note: Rule concerns Chapter 41 school district proposition approval; unrelated to homestead exemption dollar thresholds.
